# Text

**Object**

Properties shared by all text component types.

## Declaration

```swift
object Text
```

## Discussion

Apple News Format offers a range of `Text` components, each with its own `role`. You can use the [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Title] component for title text, [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Body] for body text, [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Intro] for an article introduction, [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Caption] text for media.

You can format the text you provide as HTML or Markdown, or it can be unformatted. [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/ComponentTextStyle] determines your  component’s overall text style. For styling ranges of text, your HTML or Markdown can apply [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/TextStyle] objects, and you can use [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/InlineTextStyle] objects to format unformatted text.

## Text

- **Using HTML with Apple News Format**: Use HTML formatting for text components.
- **Using Markdown with Apple News Format**: Use Markdown formatting for text components.
- **Body**: The component for adding body text.
- **Title**: The component for adding an article title.
- **Heading**: The text component for adding a heading.
- **Intro**: The component for adding introductory text.
- **Caption**: The component for adding caption text.
- **Author**: The component for adding the name of the author.
- **Byline**: The component for adding the publication date or contributor credits, especially for articles with multiple contributors.
- **Illustrator**: The component for adding illustrator credit.
- **Photographer**: The component for adding a photographer credit.
- **Quote**: The component for including a quote.
- **PullQuote**: The component for including a pull quote.

## Inherits From

- Component

## Inherited By

- ArticleTitle
- Author
- Body
- Byline
- Caption
- Heading
- Illustrator
- Intro
- Photographer
- PullQuote
- Quote
- Title
